case_title: CATHERINE SHINE et al VS. JOSEPH S. TALMADGE III

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHINE, CATHERINE SHINE, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TALMADGE III, JOSEPH S. $1,070.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,115.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHINE, CATHERINE SHINE, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT TALMADGE III, JOSEPH S.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-19-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TALMADGE III, JOSEPH S.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2011 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-19-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $15.00) SERVED SEP-22-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TALMADGE III, JOSEPH S.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT ARLENE VOLLAND ALSO APPEARS ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT JOSEPH TALMADGE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,070.00 FILED BY SHINE, CATHERINE SHINE, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT TALMADGE III, JOSEPH S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-24-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VATREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. (JUDGMENT ENTERED ON: FEBRUARY-24-2011).
